sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73374" key="*(omagu/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ὁμᾱγύριος</orth>, epith. of Zeus at Aegium as god <sense id="n73374.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the assembly,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:7:24:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.24.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
